## Summary

The 4-persona paradigm architecture powering You-Sir Juan OS. Each family member gets a named Associate Agent with its own voice, color world, label…

## Description

The 4-persona paradigm architecture powering You-Sir Juan OS. Each family member gets a named Associate Agent with its own voice, color world, label vocabulary, and persistent memory. Same backend functions, radically different presentation.
